violations.text: Icecream chest freezer lid was observed held up by tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2025
Food containers and take out cup's boxes were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
The faucet at the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. New faucet is at the establishment waiting for plumber service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

The wall next to the mop sink is constructed of porous material. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
The ceiling tiles in the storage room area is in poor repair missing some tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
